title: cydonia silvestris
intro: Cydonia silvestris, also known as the wild medlar, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cydonia silvestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cydonia silvestris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make jams, preserves, and other culinary products.
